overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a lone character trekking through a foggy, snow-covered mountain valley. The character navigates rocky terrain and snowy paths in a desolate, wintry landscape with low visibility and atmospheric blue-grey lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered path through the desolate mountain valley

entered.detail: steep snow-covered mountain slope rising prominently on the left side of the trail
narrow winding path covered in snow cutting through the mountain valley
snow-covered terrain sloping gently upward on the right side
misty valley extending into the distance with low visibility and fading mountain silhouettes

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a snow-covered trail through a wide mountain valley. A steep mountain slope rises on the left while fog obscures the distant valley ahead, creating an isolated, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain outcrop and ridge line

events.description: character begins ascending the rocky outcrop, transitioning from snow to rock surface
character traverses the rocky ridge and begins descending back toward the trail

agents.ego_description: carefully climbing up the rocky outcrop, traversing the exposed ridge line, and descending back toward the valley floor

entered.detail: large rock formation with uneven surface that the character climbs over
steep rock face with patches of snow and ice immediately adjacent to the path
narrow rocky ridge connecting the ascent and descent sections

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking to climbing, ascending a rocky outcrop that blocks the path. After traversing the exposed ridge line with steep drops visible, the character descends back toward the valley floor, with the snowy landscape visible below through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley trail continuing through the pass

agents.ego_description: continuing the trek along the snowy trail through the desolate mountain valley, navigating around scattered rocks

entered.detail: snowy path resuming through the valley with visible tire or foot tracks
large jagged rock outcrops visible through the fog in the distance
loose rocks and boulders scattered along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Having descended from the rocky outcrop, the character returns to the snow-covered trail and continues through the foggy mountain valley. Large rock formations loom in the distance as the path winds deeper into the desolate, wintry landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate mountain valley that shifts from a steady trek to a challenging ascent and back to a winding path. It begins with the character walking along a snow-covered trail beneath a steep mountain slope, with dense fog obscuring the distant horizon. As the path is blocked, the camera follows the character climbing a rocky outcrop and traversing an exposed ridge line where steep drops are visible through the haze. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the heights back toward the valley floor, returning to the snowy trail. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they venture deeper into the wintry landscape, moving toward large, looming rock formations that emerge from the fog.
